title: DLF Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Senior)

jsonLd.title: DLF Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
DLF Consulting Pvt Ltd is actively seeking a talented and motivated Senior Property Advisor to join our dynamic team in Meerut. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About DLF Consulting Pvt Ltd:
DLF Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in GIS Tools

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DLF Consulting Pvt Ltd!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
